Home / Products / Aviation Obstruction Warning Lights
Aviation Warning Lights

Aviation Obstruction Warning Lights

High-visibility obstruction lights designed to mark tall structures like towers, buildings, and chimneys to alert aircraft during low visibility. Built with durable materials and energy-efficient LEDs for long-lasting performance, low maintenance, and easy installation.

Specifications

Technical specifications

Single Low Intensity Aviation Obstruction Light

TypeUltra Bright
LED ColourRed
Power<2W Type A / <5W Type B
IP Rating65
Voltage90–270V AC / 24–60V DC
Weight1.3 Kgs

Dual Low Intensity Aviation Obstruction Light

TypeUltra Bright
LED ColourRed
Power<5W – Type B
Day/NightAuto On/Off Photo Sensor
Peak Intensity>32 cd
ICAOType B

Single Solar LED Aviation Obstruction Light

Type5mm High Power LED
LED ColourRed
Power<2W
IP Rating65
Solar Panel8W
Weight5.6 Kgs

Dual Solar LED Aviation Obstruction Light

Type5mm High Power LED
LED ColourRed
Power<3W
IP Rating65
Solar Panel8W
Weight8.5 Kgs

Medium Intensity Obstruction Light (Type-B)

TypeLED Flashing
LED ColourRed
Intensity2000 cd ±25%
Power8W
Flash20–60 fpm
Life1,00,000 Hrs
ICAOType B

Medium Intensity Obstruction Light (Type-A)

TypeLED Flashing
LED ColourWhite
IntensityDay 20000cd / Night 2000cd
Power8W
Flash20–60 fpm
Life1,00,000 Hrs
ICAOType A
